hero.subtitle: Edifika replaces WhatsApp chats, Excel spreadsheets, and paper receipts with a centralized platform for administrators and residents.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything your condominium needs
features.subtitle: Three key modules that replace all the scattered tools you use today.

payments.title: Payment & Debt Management
payments.desc: Check your debt in real-time, record payments with attached proof, and forget about informal billing.

reservations.title: Common Area Reservations
reservations.desc: Interactive calendar with real-time availability. No conflicts, no calls, no paperwork.

communications.title: Official Communications
communications.desc: Administrator publishes, everyone receives. No noise, no lost messages, and with read confirmation.

step1.title: Register your building
step1.desc: The administrator creates the building profile, adds units, and links each resident to their unit.

step2.title: Invite your residents
step2.desc: Each owner and tenant creates their account linked to their unit. Immediate access to payments, reservations, and announcements.

step3.title: Manage from one place
step3.desc: Forget WhatsApp and Excel. All condominium operations on your smartphone, available 24/7.

admin.title: Administrators
admin.desc: Manage multiple buildings from a centralized dashboard. Less operational burden, more transparency.
admin.quote: "I used to manage everything with Excel and WhatsApp. Now I manage 15 buildings from one place."
admin.author: — César, administrator

resident.title: Owners & Tenants
resident.desc: Check your debt, reserve common areas, and stay informed without depending on the administrator.
resident.quote: "I no longer need to visit the administrator's office to know how much I owe. I see everything in the app."
resident.author: — Andrea, owner

stats.stat1: Residential units sold in Lima in just one quarter
stats.stat2: Of condominiums demand better management tools
stats.stat3: In avoidable costs with efficient digital management

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Clear pricing, no surprises
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your community's size.

starter.name: Basic
starter.desc: Ideal for small buildings starting their digitalization.

pro.name: Professional
pro.desc: For medium-sized buildings with higher transaction volumes.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.desc: For property management companies handling multiple buildings.

team.label: Who are we?
team.title: Meet Condomia
team.subtitle: We are a Peruvian technology startup transforming residential community management through accessible and intuitive digital solutions.
team.mission_text: Transform residential community management through accessible and intuitive digital solutions that centralize administrative processes, improve communication, and promote transparency between administrators and residents.
team.vision_text: Become the leading platform for condominium management in Latin America, being the digital ally of every residential community seeking to operate with order, transparency, and trust.
team.team_sub: Peruvian University of Applied Sciences · Period 202610

cta.subtitle: Join communities already managing their buildings with Edifika. No complications, no long contracts.
